meta.productName: SA Pulse Competitors (EskomSePush, FlightRadar24, MarineTraffic, Windy, CapeTownData)
meta.dataQualityNote: SA Pulse has no user reviews (new project). Gaps derived from: Windy Community forums, FlightAware Trustpilot/JustUseApp reviews, MarineTraffic G2, PDC DisasterAlert Google Play reviews, SACHET App Store reviews, Earthquake+ App Store reviews, openAFRICA portal, direct feature inspection of index.html (933 lines, 22 functions).
meta.exploration: manual — gh API repo read + grep of index.html (933 lines, 22 functions) + Windy Community WebFetch

summary.title: No SA-specific civic layers
summary.text: SA Pulse has zero South African civic data: no load shedding, no dam levels, no crime stats, no traffic incidents. These are the layers SA users actually need daily. Competitors EskomSePush (3M users) and CapeTownData dominate because they cover exactly this.

summary.title: WA province groups non-functional
summary.text: The core differentiator — 9 province WhatsApp alert groups — is broken. All links point to the same phone number with text messages, not actual group invites. This must be fixed before marketing SA Pulse.

summary.title: 4 quick wins available
summary.text: Map legend, search/geocoding, share permalink, and WA group link fix are all HIGH priority, small effort. Can ship all four in one day.

summary.title: No notification system
summary.text: SA Pulse is passive — users must check the map manually. Push notifications for GDACS Red alerts, M5+ earthquakes, and nearby wildfires would be a major differentiator with zero SA competition.

summary.title: Real-time aircraft + vessel tracking unique in SA
summary.text: No other free SA dashboard shows live aircraft (OpenSky) + vessels (AISStream) on one map. This is SA Pulse's strongest current differentiator — lean into it.

findings.title: Load Shedding Layer
findings.description: SA-specific. EskomSePush has 3M users. Free API: api.eskomsepush.com (50 req/day). SA Pulse has zero electricity data.

quotes.text: EskomSePush needs to add more info besides loadshedding — water outages, weather

implementationSteps: Add /proxy/eskom route to nginx.conf proxying api.eskomsepush.com
Add 'loadshedding' layer group to layers object
Fetch /api/v2/status on page load, store stage number
Render stage badge in header next to aircraft/vessel counts
Add area schedule lookup: input field → /api/v2/area?id=... → next slot popup on map click

findings.title: Dam Levels Layer
findings.description: DWS publishes dam level data free. 37 major dams. CapeTownData shows this, SA Pulse doesn't. Cape Town Dam System at ~50% = critical info.

quotes.text: Dam levels should be on every SA weather/disaster map

implementationSteps: Add /proxy/dws route proxying dwaf.gov.za/Hydrology/Hydro/dam
Create dam coordinates lookup (37 major dams)
Add 'dams' layer group
Render dam markers with % full, color-coded (red <25%, amber <50%, green >50%)
Bind popup with dam name, capacity, current level, trend

findings.title: Map Legend
findings.description: No legend anywhere. Gold triangle = earthquake? Green circle = GDACS green? Aircraft blue? Vessel emoji types? Zero explanation for new users.

quotes.text: I have no idea what the different colored circles mean

implementationSteps: Add fixed legend div bottom-right above status bar
List each layer symbol with color swatch + label
Toggle legend visibility with L key or button
Auto-hide when layer panel is open on mobile

findings.title: Search / Geocoding
findings.description: No search bar. Can't navigate to a location. Nominatim (OSM) is free, no key.

quotes.text: Why is there no search bar? How am I supposed to find my area?

implementationSteps: Add search input to header
Add /proxy/nominatim route to nginx.conf
On submit: GET /proxy/nominatim/search?q=...&format=json&countrycodes=za
flyTo first result lat/lng at zoom 12
Show pin marker with place name

findings.title: WA Province Groups — Broken Links
findings.description: All 9 WA province panel links point to same number (27825651069) with no actual group invite URLs. Users click a province and get a generic WhatsApp chat — no group join. Core differentiator of SA Pulse is the WA alert integration. Currently non-functional.

quotes.text: Province alert groups are a great idea but the links don't join any group

implementationSteps: Create 9 WhatsApp groups (one per province)
Capture invite links for each group
Replace wa.me/?text=Join+X+Alerts hrefs with actual wa.me/g2/... group invite URLs
Add group member count display if accessible via WaSP API

findings.title: Push Notifications / Alerts
findings.description: No alert mechanism. SA Pulse only shows static WA group links. No proactive push for new GDACS Red alert, M5+ earthquake, new wildfire in user's province.

quotes.text: I want to get notified when there's a wildfire near me, not check the map manually

implementationSteps: Add Web Push manifest + service worker (sw.js)
Add subscribe button to header
On new GDACS Red or M5+ quake or wildfire in SA: service worker notifies all subscribers
Server-side: Node.js PM2 process checks feeds every 5min, sends web-push to subscribed endpoints
Optional: also post to province WA group via WaSP

findings.title: Crime Statistics Layer
findings.description: SAPS publishes crime stats per police station annually. CapeTownData has ward-level safety scores. SA Pulse has nothing. Crime is top concern for SA residents.

quotes.text: Cape Town crime scores by ward are the most useful feature on any SA app

implementationSteps: Source latest SAPS crime stats CSV (published annually, free)
Parse to GeoJSON keyed by police station with coords
Add 'crime' layer group
Render choropleth: red = high crime, green = low
Bind popup with station name, top 3 crimes, year-on-year trend

findings.title: Traffic / Road Incidents
findings.description: i-traffic.co.za has free road incident API. N1, N2, N3 accidents affect millions daily. No traffic layer in SA Pulse.
implementationSteps: Add /proxy/itraffic route to nginx.conf
Fetch road incidents on load
Add 'traffic' layer group
Render incident markers: accident (🚗), roadworks (🚧), hazard (⚠️)
Popup: road, description, time reported

findings.title: Air Quality (AQI)
findings.description: SA Highveld has worst air pollution in southern hemisphere (coal power stations, mining). OpenAQ free API. No AQI in SA Pulse.
implementationSteps: Add /proxy/openaq route to nginx.conf proxying api.openaq.org/v3/locations
Add 'airquality' layer group
Fetch SA monitoring stations on load
Render AQI colored circles (green/yellow/orange/red/maroon)
Popup: pollutant breakdown, station name, last reading time

findings.title: Share / Permalink
findings.description: Can't bookmark or share specific map view. URL never changes as user pans/zooms.
implementationSteps: On map moveend/zoomend: update URL hash with lat,lng,zoom
On page load: read hash and flyTo if present
Add 'Share' button that copies current URL to clipboard
Include active layer state in hash as bitmask

findings.title: Weather Detail — Forecast + Radar
findings.description: Current weather layer: single temp badge per city. Windy complaint: no forecast timeline, no radar overlay. Open-Meteo has 7-day hourly forecast free.
implementationSteps: Expand weather popup to show 24h forecast (hourly temp + precip bar chart)
Add wind direction arrows to weather markers
Add precipitation probability layer (color gradient)
Link to full forecast page for each city

findings.title: Vessel Port Activity Summary
findings.description: Vessels render with destination field but no port-level summary. SA has 3 major ports (Cape Town, Durban, Port Elizabeth). MarineTraffic complaint: no port overview.
implementationSteps: Add port polygon markers for CT/Durban/PE
Count vessels within 50km of each port from vessels.json
Render port marker with vessel count badge
Popup: port name, vessels in/out, busiest vessel type

findings.title: Historical Event Timeline
findings.description: No timeline. All data is live. Can't see: "how many wildfires in Western Cape last 30 days?" or earthquake frequency patterns.
implementationSteps: Add SQLite event log (ships.mjs already runs as PM2 process — extend it)
Log each EONET/GDACS/USGS event on ingest with timestamp + geom
Add date-range slider UI to map
Filter displayed markers by selected date range
Add event count chart in sidebar

findings.title: Mobile UX / PWA
findings.description: SA Pulse has basic responsive breakpoint. But: no installable PWA, no service worker, no offline capability. External Leaflet CDN = fails offline. SA mobile users often on poor connectivity.
implementationSteps: Add Web App Manifest (manifest.json)
Bundle Leaflet locally instead of unpkg CDN
Add service worker with cache-first strategy for map tiles
Optimize touch targets for layer toggles on mobile
Add 'Add to Home Screen' prompt

findings.title: Wind Animation Layer
findings.description: Windy's differentiator is animated wind particles. Technically achievable with Leaflet.VelocityLayer plugin. Open-Meteo provides wind U/V components.
implementationSteps: Add Leaflet.VelocityLayer to bundle
Fetch Open-Meteo wind U/V grid for SA bbox
Render animated particle flow layer
Add toggle in layer panel

findings.title: No marker clustering — illegible at global zoom
findings.description: At zoom 4-5, dozens of overlapping markers from GDACS, USGS, EMSC, EONET, vessels and aircraft create an illegible blob. FlightAware and MarineTraffic both cluster high-density data. Leaflet.markercluster is a free 1-file drop-in.

quotes.text: Layer list redesigned as grid requiring excessive scanning — too much visual noise

implementationSteps: Add Leaflet.markercluster via CDN: https://unpkg.com/leaflet.markercluster@1.5.3/dist/leaflet.markercluster.js
Add CSS: https://unpkg.com/leaflet.markercluster@1.5.3/dist/MarkerCluster.css
Replace L.layerGroup() with L.markerClusterGroup() for earthquakes, events, gdacs, emsc layers
Keep aircraft + vessels as plain layerGroups (real-time positioning accuracy matters)
Style cluster icons with dark theme matching map palette

findings.title: EONET fire points only — NASA FIRMS hotspots missing
findings.description: EONET tracks named fire events (17 globally, mostly US). NASA FIRMS provides near-realtime dense hotspot data from MODIS/VIIRS — thousands of detections globally per day including Africa. SA's Western Cape and Garden Route have major annual fire seasons.
implementationSteps: Register free NASA FIRMS API key at firms.modaps.eosdis.nasa.gov (email only)
Add nginx proxy: location /proxy/firms/ { proxy_pass https://firms.modaps.eosdis.nasa.gov/api/; }
Fetch VIIRS_SNPP_NRT hotspots for SA bbox last 24h as CSV
Parse CSV, plot small red dots (radius 4) on existing wildfires layer
Cache 1h to stay within free tier limits

findings.title: No radius / proximity filter — can't see events near a city
findings.description: Cannot filter events to 'within X km of Johannesburg'. For SA emergency managers, showing events near a specific city or facility is the core use case. Windy users repeatedly requested regional comparison features.

quotes.text: zoom to a specific region and compare different locations without map repositioning

implementationSteps: Add 'Focus Area' button in layer panel
On click: enable circle-draw mode, place L.circle at click point with draggable radius handle
Filter all visible markers to only those inside the circle (L.latLng.distanceTo)
Show filtered count in status bar: '12 events within 150km of Johannesburg'
Include circle center + radius in permalink hash
